subject: Appointment With Guidance Counsellor
content:
Dear %player%,

I am writing to encourage all students to schedule a meeting with me to discuss their plans after they graduate from high school. Now is a good time to start thinking about the next exciting chapter of your life.

I’d like to chat with you about your options. Are you available this morning?

Best regards,

Ms. White
Guidance Counselor

options.text:
Good morning Ms. White,

I saw your email this morning and I would like to take you up on that offer. I currently have a spare during the first period. Would you be willing to make time for me then?

Sincerely,
%player%

actions.title: Open the Achievements App on Your Phone
actions.description: You got a new badge! Check it out!
